name: Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until well blended.
2. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, until smooth.
3. Mix in the sour milk alternately with the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt).
4. Fold in the mashed bananas and nuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan or divide it among muffin tins lined with paper liners.
6. Bake at 350°F for about an hour, until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool before serving.
